active_goal: Advance the Mac-local MLX inference stack only with changes that measurably improve retained prompt-processing or generation latency, preserve response quality, and do not increase runtime instability.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream candidate refresh
recent_milestones.summary: Refreshed upstream candidate triage. No safe cherry-pick selected; runtime unchanged.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream scan tooling
recent_milestones.summary: Added scripts/upstream_candidate_scan.py and tests. Generated a factual JSON upstream scan report for six candidate branches.

recent_milestones.name: LM Studio server state probe
recent_milestones.summary: Starting the supported LM Studio server on port 4521 did not make retained LFM2.5-VL visible to lms ls --json. Server was stopped after the diagnostic.

recent_milestones.name: LM Studio load/import diagnostics
recent_milestones.summary: lms load --estimate-only on the retained absolute model directory returned Model not found. lms import --dry-run on model.safetensors is not a viable MLX directory registration path.

recent_milestones.name: Handoff refresh
recent_milestones.summary: Updated planning/handoff state and kept the LM Studio visibility blocker as active.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream readable scan
recent_milestones.summary: Scored the M62 upstream scan against prior head and prepared readable markdown report artifacts.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream scan diff tooling
recent_milestones.summary: Added review-only diff artifacts for adjacent upstream candidate scan states; candidate branches remained unchanged.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream scan history
recent_milestones.summary: Added a review-only multi-scan history renderer and documented no-promotion candidate triage evidence.

recent_milestones.name: Upstream candidate refresh
recent_milestones.summary: Refreshed local-head upstream scan evidence (`a1a9dea`), with unchanged six-branch payload status.

blockers.description: Retained LFM2.5-VL model directory is complete and LM Studio model-data contains the key, but lms ls --json does not expose the VLM. Server state, absolute-directory load estimate, and safetensors import dry-run did not unblock visibility.

hard_constraints: Do not remove restore-time mx.eval(...) as a shortcut.
Do not retry full-prefix KV span packing without a different write-amplification plan.
Do not promote a runtime candidate without repeated retained-workload benchmarks, passing quality gates, candidate-vs-baseline deltas, and live LM Studio validation.
Do not hand-edit LM Studio model indexes or cache files.
Do not treat a copied LM Studio model directory or model-data entry as sufficient; lms ls --json must expose the retained VLM model key.
next_actions: If LM Studio model registration changes, rerun scripts/lmstudio_vlm_live_validation_preflight.py with a fresh output path.
If preflight reports ready_for_live_validation=true, proceed to backend registration and live /v1/chat/completions validation for the installed LM Studio runtime.
For future upstream refreshes, run scripts/upstream_candidate_scan.py --fetch with a fresh output path.

For any new text-cache runtime candidate, capture a retained candidate report with scripts/lfm25_text_cache_bench.py and compare it with scripts/lfm25_text_cache_compare.py before promotion discussion.
If no LM Studio progress is possible, continue only with isolated local hypotheses that preserve the no-promotion rule until live validation is available.

validation.command: git diff --check before M58, M59, and M60 commits
